CustomField.description: MIS-4278 - Added division MIR Last activity for Replied automation
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( TODAY() - LastActivityDate >= 30, OR( text(Status__c) = 'Replied', AND( text(Status__c) = 'SDR prospecting', Sync_to_Sfmc__c = TRUE ), AND( Owner_Division__c = 'MIR', text(Status__c) = 'Replied', today() - DATEVALUE(Status_changed_timestamp__c) >= 30 ) ) ), TRUE, FALSE )
CustomField.label: Last activity for Replied automation
